_meta.author: scorecard-refine-national autopilot
_meta.note: Evidence-finalize TX House batch HD59-63 (slawson, olcott, richardson, luther, bumgarner). All R incumbents who advanced/won the 2026-03-03 GOP primary -> general_candidate. State tier, evidence_state. Every TRUE cites a vote/sponsorship/rating/self-statement; no contrary evidence found for any, remainder null.

shelby-slawson@TX.notes_set: TX House HD-59 (Coryell/Erath/Hamilton/Hood) since 2021; attorney. Advanced from 2026-03-03 GOP primary, faces D Andrew Turner in 2026-11-03 general. Authored HB1165 'Heartbeat Bill' (87R) and HB1515 (SB8 companion). Texas Values Action 2025: 100% (Faith & Family Champion); Texas Alliance for Life 89th: 93%; YCT career ~90 (endorsed). Voted FOR SB2 (ESA vouchers), SB12 (Parents' Bill of Rights), SB13 (library content), SB10 (Ten Commandments), SB11 (school prayer), SB965 (Coach Joe Kennedy law), SB8 (women's privacy), HB229 (What is a Woman Act); voted AGAINST HB1738 (repeal of homosexual-conduct statute). No documented contrary positions; no economy/election/justice/border roll calls located -> null.

mike-olcott@TX.notes_set: TX House HD-60 (Palo Pinto/Parker/Stephens) since 2025; beat incumbent Glenn Rogers in 2024 primary. Won 2026-03-03 GOP primary vs Amy Fennell; on 2026-11-03 general ballot. Texas Values Action 2025: 96% (Faith & Family Champion); Texas Right to Life 89%; Texas Alliance for Life 89%; YCT top-five House member (endorsed 2026). Voted FOR SB33 (no taxpayer abortion funds), HB229, SB1257, SB2 (vouchers), SB12, SB13, SB10, SB11, SB965; voted AGAINST HB1738 and AGAINST HB2 (public-school spending, a fiscal-right no). Authored HB3210 (state E-Verify mandate), HB1324 (no in-state tuition for illegal aliens), HB4745 (no public benefits for illegal aliens). Campaign: life begins at conception/abortion abolished, photo voter ID, fund police, 10th Amendment. No contrary positions found.

3.note: No documented position on euthanasia/assisted suicide.

4.note: Pro-life champion (TRTL/TAL 89%), no abortion-industry money.

keresa-richardson@TX.notes_set: TX House HD-61 (Collin County/McKinney) since 2025-01-14; won 2024 runoff over former Rep. Frazier. Won 2026-03-03 GOP primary vs Frazier (~34 pts); on 2026-11-03 general ballot. Texas Alliance for Life 90%; Texas Taxpayers Fiscal Index 92; YCT-endorsed 2026; endorsed by Trump/Abbott/Paxton/Cruz. Voted FOR HB1056 (gold/silver constitutional money), HB796 (Texas Sovereignty Act); AGAINST HB1738 (homosexual-conduct repeal), HB2 (public-school spending, a fiscal-right no), HJR98 (Article V convention), SB243 (migrant labor camps). Among the 85 R yes votes on SB2 vouchers (only Phelan & VanDeaver were R nays). Campaign: protect life, ESAs, parental rights, proof-of-citizenship voter ID + anti-harvesting. No contrary positions found. (Freedom Index 67% is a libertarian-purity index, not a conservatism grade.)

shelley-luther@TX.notes_set: TX House HD-62 (Delta/Fannin/Franklin/Grayson) since 2025-01-14; Dallas-area salon owner jailed in 2020 for COVID-lockdown defiance; beat incumbent Reggie Smith in 2024. Unopposed 2026-03-03 GOP primary; on 2026-11-03 general ballot vs D Catherine Thorne. Texas Right to Life 89th: 100; Texas Alliance for Life 93%; Texas Taxpayers Fiscal Index 97; YCT-endorsed 2026; endorsed by Trump/Cruz/Abbott/Paxton. Voted FOR SB2 (vouchers) and to table the ballot amendment. Authored HB3441 (vaccine-manufacturer liability). Campaign: ban SOGI instruction in schools/libraries, defund entities exposing minors to inappropriate content, eliminate property taxes by cutting spending, proof-of-citizenship + photo voter ID, resist unconstitutional federal mandates, create a state DHS to prevent illegal entry and deport. No contrary positions found.

ben-bumgarner@TX.notes_set: TX House HD-63 (southern Denton County) since 2023; firearms-manufacturer co-owner (Evolve Weapons Systems); former Flower Mound council member. Unopposed 2026-03-03 GOP primary; on 2026-11-03 general ballot vs D H. Denise Wooten. Texas Right to Life 88th: 85%; Texas Values Action 75%; Texas Family Project 84%; Eagle Forum TX 67%; YCT 80% session/82% career; ACU-TX 70%; weaker fiscal (TFR 52%, Freedom Index 50%). Texas Alliance for Life PAC + Texas Home School Coalition + NRA-PVF endorsed. Voted FOR SB2 (vouchers) and pro-life budget/A2A items; campaign affirms one-man-one-woman marriage. TXRTL docked him for declining to coauthor 2 priority bills (passive, not oppositional). No contrary positions found; thin record -> many null.
